title: Welcome To My Blog
text:
This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.

title: Collin Henkel
text:
Data Science • Mathematics • Machine Learning
I am a Data Science and Mathematics student at the University of Nebraska–Lincoln with experience in data analysis, SQL, and machine learning. My work focuses on building data-driven insights from structured datasets and developing reproducible analysis workflows.
This portfolio highlights selected projects involving statistical modeling, data validation, and applied machine learning.




Health Risk Modeling Analysis
Business Data Analysis Report

View all projects →





Programming: Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn), R, SQL

Tools: Tableau, Excel, Jupyter, Git

Methods: Regression, Classification, Statistical Inference, Data Validation






Email: collinh929@gmail.com

title: About
text:
About
I am a senior at the University of Nebraska–Lincoln studying Data Science and Mathematics. I am interested in data analysis, machine learning, and applying data-driven methods to real-world problems.
I have experience working with SQL, Python, and large structured datasets, including validating and analyzing production data systems.
I am currently seeking data analyst and data science roles.

title: Projects
text:
Tools: Python, pandas, scikit-learn

Built regression models to analyze relationships between socioeconomic factors and health outcomes

Performed data cleaning, feature engineering, and model evaluation

Visualized trends across geographic regions

Download Preliminary Analysis (PDF)




Tools: Python, Quarto

Developed a structured business analysis report using real-world data

Combined data processing, visualization, and written insights

Generated actionable recommendations based on data trends

View Report





Tools: TensorFlow, Keras

Built sequential neural networks for text classification tasks

Preprocessed text data and evaluated model performance

Explored model architecture and hyperparameter tuning

Download Report (PDF)




Tools: TensorFlow, CNN

Implemented convolutional neural networks for image classification

Trained and evaluated models on real-world digit recognition dataset

Improved performance through architecture tuning

Download Report (PDF)




Tools: TensorFlow

Designed and trained neural network architectures for image classification

Compared model performance across different architectures

Analyzed tradeoffs between complexity and accuracy

Download Report (PDF)
